---
title: "WGRA Nuggets"
subtitle: "Browsable bites on the ideas behind the Wiki-Grounded Research Agent"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
---

One idea per nugget: short, self-contained, and browsable in any order. The [flyer](https://la3d.github.io/WGRA/) makes the full case and the [deep dives](https://la3d.github.io/WGRA/) go long; these sit in between, a set of concepts you can graze rather than a story you follow start to finish.

Start anywhere. If you want the lineage, [Karpathy's llm-wiki](posts/karpathy-llm-wiki/) is where the whole thing begins.
